title: Venue
doc_html:
§390.4. Venue

           Violations of R.S. 14:390 through 390.8 are considered to take place at the location where the prohibited contraband material is found, either stored in bulk or placed in the hands of the ultimate user.

           Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.
doc_text:
§390.4.  Venue
Violations of R.S. 14:390 through 390.8 are considered to take place at
the location where the prohibited contraband material is found, either stored
in bulk or placed in the hands of the ultimate user.
Added by Acts 1962, No. 245, §1.
